zh.Kingstone, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特金斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG於1475年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她於1473年與Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe在英國英格蘭戴文霍爾可姆 伯奈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1515年在英國英格蘭肯特金斯頓享年40歲。

zh-hans.Kingstone, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特金斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG于1475年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可。她于1473年与Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe在英国英格兰戴文霍爾可姆 伯奈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1515年在英国英格兰肯特金斯頓享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Loveday
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal nameLoveday, Old English Lēofdæg, composed of theelements lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + dæg‘day’.
nickname for someone who had some particular associationwith a ‘loveday’. According to medieval custom this was a day setaside for the reconciliation of enemies and amicable settlement ofdisputes.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG was born in 1475, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe in 1473, in Holcombe Burnell, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1515, in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG est née en 1475, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe en 1473, à Holcombe Burnell, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1515, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG wurde 1475 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1473 in Holcombe Burnell, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG è nata il nel 1475 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe nel 1473, nel Holcombe Burnell, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1515, nel Kingston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGGは1475年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた。1473年にイギリスイギリスデボンホールコンベ ブルネルでSir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1515年にイギリスイギリスケントキングストンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG(은)는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 홀코브 버넬에서 Sir William Thomas Dennis , Lord of Holcombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그스턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Loveday 14thGG родилась в 1475 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
